summary: Full E2E testing of Construções Barros orçamentos app: 10/10 backend pytest cases passed (company GET/PUT, next-number, create with totals computation across IVA 0/6/13/23, sequential numero, list, get, patch with recompute, delete, 404). Frontend flow verified end-to-end on mobile viewport 390x844: 3-tab navigation (Orçamentos/Novo/Definições) works, Novo form renders with next-number pill (2026004), client + sinistro fields fillable, save-draft-btn creates an orçamento that appears in the list, detail screen renders document preview with logo, company header, items table, totals, validade, status buttons (rascunho/enviado/aceite), share-pdf-btn, preview-pdf-btn, back-btn, delete-btn. Status change PATCH works. Filter chips (todos/rascunho/enviado/aceite) present. Definições tab pre-loads CONSTRUÇÕES BARROS company data (nif 195060822, telefone 930 582 585, email, morada).

react_native_issues.issue: Expo Router warning in logs: 'Too many screens defined. Route "orcamento/[id]" is extraneous.' — suggests an extra <Stack.Screen> declaration in _layout.tsx that does not match the file route. Cosmetic, but should be cleaned up.

Difficult to trigger from Playwright force-click in web preview (item form did not open on automated click). Likely related to react-native-web Pressable using pointer events; real touch works (verified by manual screenshot showing item 'Lavar poço' persisted). Recommend swapping critical action Pressables to TouchableOpacity or adding onClick fallback for web-automation friendliness.

action_items: Remove extraneous Stack.Screen for orcamento/[id] in app/_layout.tsx (Expo Router warning).
Optional: Replace Pressable with TouchableOpacity for add-item-btn / draft-iva chips to improve testability in headless web. Not blocking — UI works in real mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is clean: uses async motor, env-based MONGO_URL/DB_NAME, excludes _id everywhere via projection {_id:0}, uses Pydantic for validation, computes totals server-side, atomic counter via find_one_and_update with upsert.
Sequential numero generator (orc_<year> counter) is atomic and correct; verified peek-next-number matches actually-assigned numero.
PATCH recomputes totals when items change and recomputes validade_ate when validade_dias changes — correct.
No mocked APIs. PDF share buttons render but cannot be exercised in headless browser (expected).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows verified; minor Pressable automation friction)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_ orçamentos during pytest run (proper cleanup). One UI-created orçamento (2026004) remains in DB — main agent can delete via DELETE /api/orcamentos/{id} if undesired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully tested with pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_orcamentos_api.py. Frontend: use add-item-btn → wait 800ms → draft-descricao becomes visible. testIDs available per request. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) is the env key used by frontend.
